resources.string: Intercepts steering-wheel buttons to project navigation onto the instrument cluster. Enabled manually, works only when the feature is on.
Projection to cluster via wheel button
A short press of the chosen steering-wheel button moves the selected app to the cluster and back.
Show on the cluster right away
Off by default: verify manual projection on your cluster first

For the voice agent to see the navigator on the cluster, reboot the DiLink head unit once: press and hold the volume knob. Simply turning the car off is not enough. Until the reboot projection still works, but the agent cannot see the route.
Window width as % of the cluster width
Window height as % of the cluster height
Window position: 0 - left edge, 50 - center, 100 - right edge
UI size: lower value - smaller elements and more map in the window
This button can\'t be assigned. Press another.
Button not recognized. It may not reach the system. Try another.
The new tariff applies to future trips.\nTrips already calculated will not change.
Recalculates the cost of all trips\nusing the current tariff.
Target profile: Sea Lion 07 EV 2025. BYDMate uses energydata when available and otherwise records trips from live telemetry.
If the list stays empty after 2–3 drives — switch the mode.
Extended vehicle data: battery SoH, BMS mileage, charge statistics. Read-only.
All trips will be recalculated using tariff %1$s %2$s/kWh.\nExisting calculated values will be replaced.
Live data -> A Better Route Planner
Live data (SOC, power, temperatures, odometer, tire pressure) is sent to the Iternio Telemetry API for an up-to-date plan in ABRP. GPS is not sent - ABRP reads coordinates itself.
For internet search by the voice agent. Without a key, search goes through OpenRouter
- Long tap the widget - hide until BYDMate is opened next time.\n- Drag to the bin at the bottom - turn off completely.\n- Regular tap - open BYDMate.
The button panel hides while YouTube is on screen
If seat heating or ventilation stops working after switching cars
If trips are not being recorded: the app will re-check whether the car maintains its own trip database and enable built-in recording when needed
Hides the native BYD voice assistant so it does not interrupt. Reversible.
Takes effect after restarting the head unit.
Left 1/3 - opens the selected app; the rest - BYDMate.
Default is Waze. If the app is removed, the tap will not work.
A single tap slides out 4 buttons, a double tap opens BYDMate. A button runs a rule with the "Button press" trigger.
Home, work, favorite places - Place enter / Place exit triggers
Check GitHub 30 seconds after startup and suggest updating
restart the app if ADB is enabled in Developer settings
connected, but data is not readable
compatibility depends on the vehicle firmware
No data for the selected period
No charging sessions for the selected period
%1$s km - the trip and its route will be deleted and cannot be restored.
Charging statistics are unavailable. To see kWh and cost for each charging session, enable \"System data\" in Settings.
Charging statistics are unavailable for your car model - diagnostic data cannot be read. SoH is not shown either.
New charging sessions are not being tracked right now.
Waiting for the first response from the car...
Enable "System data" in Settings to see BMS mileage and lifetime pumped total.
Cell delta: shown after 3 completed charging sessions (now: %1$d)
Temperature: shown after 3 completed charging sessions (now: %1$d)
SOC must be from 0 to 100, and ending SOC must be greater than starting SOC
Create a place in settings first
Phrase is already a built-in command
Phrase is already used by another automation
Sound notifications are shown as a popup over other apps. Open system settings and enable \"Display over other apps\" for BYDMate.
Add a place in Settings -> Places first
No places yet. Tap \"+ Add\" to create one.
Place is used in %1$d automations. Delete the rules first.
This dev build targets the 2025 BYD Sea Lion 07 EV, 610 Zhijia RWD (China).
You can change this later in settings.
Enter a capacity from 1 to 250 kWh
Sea Lion 07 EV 2025 (610 Zhijia RWD): 80.64 kWh
Cost = consumption × tariff. You can change it later in settings.
To make BYDMate start automatically when the head unit turns on:
1. Tap the button on the right
OFF = autostart ALLOWED. This is a blacklist: apps disabled in it CAN start by themselves.
Check this setting after updating the APK!
If autostart did not work, add this in Di+:
打开应用 = \"open app\" + package name.\nFor two apps separated by semicolon:\n打开应用com.waze;打开应用%1$s
Could not open DiLink autostart settings. App settings were opened.
Widget hidden. Open BYDMate - it will return.

Check that background work is not blocked:

DiLink Settings - General - Disable background Apps - BYDMate - OFF

If the switch is ON, DiLink may kill the BYDMate service - then trips and GPS will not be recorded.
Could not open DiLink autostart settings. App settings were opened.
Enable \"System data\" in Settings to see SoH, BMS mileage, and total pumped from the car.

Time-weighted state of charge: the longer the battery sits charged, the higher the value. BYD LFP packs age slower when kept lower: storing at a high charge speeds up calendar aging. Guideline: below 65% is great, 65-85% is fine, above 85% consider charging later or less often. A 100% charge once every 1-2 weeks is still needed for cell balancing. Computed from BYDMate trip and charge history.
Exported: %1$d trips, %2$d charging sessions, %3$d track points, %4$d idle drains
Need at least 5 trips in the last 7 days
Many short trips — warmup uses extra energy
Avg %1$.1f kWh/100 — better than last week
Avg %1$.1f kWh/100, better than last month
%1$d of %2$d trips under 5 km (%3$d%%) — combine short errands
Idle with engine on: %1$.1f kWh over %2$s — %3$d%% of weekly use
Idle with engine on: %1$.1f kWh over %2$s, %3$d%% of monthly use
Aux battery %1$.1f V — have it checked
12V falling: %1$.2f to %2$.2f V over the week
12V falling: %1$.2f to %2$.2f V over the month
Cell spread %1$.0f mV — possible weak cell
At %1$d°C avg consumption %2$.1f kWh/100 — normal in winter
%1$.1f kWh at night — %2$d%% of engine-on idle
Night (10pm–6am) idle: %1$.1f kWh (%2$d%% of total). Turn off ignition if climate is not needed
DC %1$.2f %4$s/kWh vs AC %2$.2f — %3$d%% more than home charging
DC %1$.0f kWh (%2$d sessions) vs AC %3$.0f — home AC is gentler for daily use
All %2$d charges were AC (%1$.0f kWh) — good for battery and budget
All %2$d charges this month were AC (%1$.0f kWh), good for battery and budget
Avg speed %1$.0f km/h — highway consumption %2$.1f kWh/100 is expected
High avg consumption %1$.1f kWh/100 — check climate and driving style
Great avg %1$.1f kWh/100 over %2$.0f km this week
Great avg %1$.1f kWh/100 over %2$.0f km this month
High idle draw ~%1$.1f kWh/h — likely climate or heating
Mileage up: %1$.0f to %2$.0f km — may explain average consumption shift
%1$.0f km in %2$d trips this week — solid data for analysis
%1$.0f km in %2$d trips this month, solid data for analysis
Cell spread %1$.0f mV — balance looks fine
At %1$d°C avg consumption %2$.1f kWh/100 — A/C adds load
Best trip %1$.1f kWh/100 over %2$.0f km — efficient driving
Charging this week: AC %1$.0f kWh, DC %2$.0f kWh — home AC is gentler for daily use
Charging this month: AC %1$.0f kWh, DC %2$.0f kWh, home AC is gentler for daily use
Night idle only %1$d%% — good habit turning ignition off
Engine-on idle only %1$d%% of weekly use — well done
Engine-on idle only %1$d%% of monthly use, well done
All current data and settings will be replaced with the backup contents. This cannot be undone.
The backup contains your trip history with GPS routes and your API keys in plain text. The file is saved to the public Download folder. Keep it somewhere safe and do not share it.
Action #%1$d: only a valid web, Waze, geo, or Yandex Music URL is allowed
Action #%1$d: Yandex Music mode not selected
Action #%1$d: speak text is not set
Action #%1$d: agent query prompt is not set
Name and at least one condition and action are required
Voice model is not downloaded. Get it in Settings, Voice agent section.
Voice commands understand Russian speech only. Set Voice language to Russian in Settings.
Steering-wheel trigger requires the accessibility service (auto-enabled in the Display section).
Needed to call a contact by name using voice
Reply volume is controlled by the system Voice channel: steering-wheel volume buttons or the car\'s Sound settings
New engine, the most natural sound
Natural Russian voice · reply starts slightly later than the local voice
Natural Russian voice · reply starts slightly later than the local voice
Online voices need a network connection; if the service does not answer within 2 seconds, the reply stays silent
The key and model are configured in AI connections.
$0.06 per 1000 characters · official is the fastest to start
Left - slower and clearer, right - faster
Left - flat \"announcer\" tone, right - more expressive, but may waver
For example: Leo. 2-3 syllables, a distinct word works best
Applies to all voices: each source has a male and a female option
Free-form questions and commands via an LLM (OpenRouter). Uses the API key from Integrations.
The OpenRouter key and model for the agent are configured in Integrations
Error: agent disabled or not configured
Free glm-4.7-flash, recommended as the primary model
Any OpenAI-compatible API. A preset fills in the URL and model, bring your own key.
Server unreachable: the car\'s internet cannot resolve this address (DNS)
Server did not respond in time
Replace ACCOUNT_ID in the URL with your account ID from the Cloudflare dashboard. Free tier is about 450 requests per day (glm-4.7-flash).
5$ monthly credit, no card required. Some models on the free tier may return a 403 error.
Pay as you go, 50% off at night (Moscow time).
The fallback model kicks in automatically when the primary does not respond (after one retry). Only configured connections are listed.
Without an Exa key the agent uses the current connection\'s built-in search. If that is unavailable too, the agent will honestly say search is not working.
Used to estimate range and cost
Cost of 1 kWh when charging at home (AC)
Cost of 1 kWh at DC fast chargers
Which tariff to use for trip costs
UI heuristic (default 18), not the official rated consumption
UI heuristic (default 24), not the official rated consumption
Battery charge on top of any app
Return the widget to its default position
Full trip history as one file in the Download folder
Detailed activity log for troubleshooting. Enable when the developer asks for it
Backup: trip history with GPS and API keys in plain text, file in the Download folder
Current data and settings will be fully replaced with the backup contents
BYDMate starts together with the car. If a firmware update broke autostart, re-enable it in the system setting
A point is added from the map or from the car\'s current position
Model test checks the connection, chat shows a text dialog with the agent

The project is non-commercial and completely free, built purely out of enthusiasm. If BYDMate has been useful to you and you would like to say thanks, you can support development with a USDT transfer on any of the networks below.
BYDMate is non-commercial and free. If you would like to support development, send USDT to the address below on any EVM network.
Point your phone\'s camera at the code
Networks: Arbitrum One, Optimism, Polygon, BNB Smart Chain, Avalanche, Ethereum
Do not send via TON, TRON (TRC-20), or Solana. Funds will be lost.
BYDMate is free and non-commercial. If it\'s useful to you, you can support development.
Waze guidance on the head-up display: maneuver, distance, street, arrival
Red speed-limit sign in the lower HUD slot
SOME/IP bus not found: HUD output is unavailable on this car
Could not connect to the SOME/IP bus
Bus connected, but the HUD frame was rejected
Requires a trim with the head-up display. Data comes from the Waze window and navigation notification
Status of the BYDMate service, BYD data, Waze, cluster, and HUD
System checks are still in progress
Some systems do not have data yet
The background service is running and receiving vehicle data
The background service is running, but vehicle data has not arrived yet
Demo Mode is enabled: the displayed data does not come from the real vehicle
The BYDMate background service is not running
The energydata database file was found and is readable
The energydata database exists but has stopped updating
The energydata database is unavailable or unreadable
BYD services are connected and vehicle data is flowing
The helper daemon is available, but vehicle data has not arrived yet
Vehicle data is flowing, but the helper daemon is unavailable
Neither the helper daemon nor vehicle data is connected
Waze is available and route guidance can be read
Route is active through a fallback source; Accessibility cannot currently see the complete route panel
Waze and accessibility are ready; no route is active now
A Waze route is open, but BYDMate cannot read its navigation guidance
Waze is available, but accessibility cannot see its window
The accessibility service is enabled but not connected to system windows
The BYDMate accessibility service is disabled
Projection to the cluster is active
Projection is active; the cluster display was found in %1$d ms
The cluster display was found and is ready for projection
Projection did not start because the helper daemon is unavailable
The cluster display was not found within %1$d ms
No compatible cluster display is currently available
SOME/IP accepted a navigation frame; HUD visibility is confirmed separately
The SOME/IP channel is connected and waiting for navigation guidance
Could not connect to the SOME/IP bus
The bus is connected, but the HUD frame was rejected
No SOME/IP HUD was found on this vehicle
HUD is enabled in settings, but the channel is not running
Successful reads are confirmed automatically. Physical commands, charging, cluster projection, and HUD can be confirmed after an in-car test.
Accessibility stopped seeing the Waze window
HUD frames stopped being delivered; exact cause unconfirmed
36 bounded parked scenarios test CLEAR, arrows, isolated fields, full frames, transitions and delivery cadence on the windshield HUD.
Scenarios use single frames and bounded 100/300/500 ms bursts. Export records every packet, SOME/IP code, field manifest and payload hash.
Vehicle is stationary and gear P is selected
The frame clears automatically after 8 seconds. Tests are blocked while moving or during an active route.
Display time ended and the HUD was cleared. You can still save the result.
What did the windshield HUD actually show?
Arrow stayed continuous; CLEAR was not visible
Series sent; last SOME/IP reply rc=%1$d. This is a transport code; record the visual result.
Result saved to the HUD Lab journal.
Could not save the HUD Lab report.
HUD Lab is available only in the dev build.
Confirm that the vehicle is stationary in P.
Fresh speed and gear data are unavailable. Wait for the background service to connect.
Test blocked: the vehicle is moving.
End the active Waze route first.
Enable factory HUD output in BYDMate settings first.
The SOME/IP HUD channel is not connected yet.
The test payload failed internal validation.
The bundled maneuver PNG icon could not be loaded.
None of the three CLEAR calls received rc=0 confirmation; visual cleanup is unconfirmed.
The test could not be saved. The HUD was cleared safely; try again.
The test frame did not receive rc=0 confirmation. The result was logged and a safe cleanup attempt was made.
Separately tests the second display: inventory, projection state, calibration grid and two bounded Waze projection cycles.
For C03–C05 manually open the factory Navi/projection mode. The lab never enables unvalidated auto_container commands and always restores OFF.
What happened on the instrument cluster during %1$s?
BYDMate Dev only. In Demo Mode the app does not read the vehicle or run commands, automations, or history imports.
Show realistic telemetry, trips, routes, and charging sessions for testing on a computer.
Recreate demo trips and charges relative to the current date.
Demo disabled. Removed: %1$d trips and %2$d charges.
